goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should go to 'kings lynn' and should 'arrive by 11:00'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'architecture'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on tuesday
The train should go to kings lynn and should arrive by 11:00
Make sure you get departure time and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of architecture
Make sure you get phone number and address
